test-method.name: testSaveValidContractConfig
test-method.description: TC_CC_P01 – Update all fields with valid standard values and save

test-method.name: testUpdateRecommendedDownPayment
test-method.description: TC_CC_P02 – Update Recommended Down Payment to a higher value and save

test-method.name: testUpdateInterestRate
test-method.description: TC_CC_P03 – Update Interest Percentage to a new valid value and save

test-method.name: testUpdateFinancingMonths
test-method.description: TC_CC_P04 – Update Financing Months Past Treatment and save

test-method.name: testUpdateInterestToZero
test-method.description: TC_CC_P05 – Update Interest Percentage to 0 (interest-free) and save

test-method.name: testContractConfigFieldsVisible
test-method.description: TC_CC_P06 – Verify all contract config fields are visible and editable

test-method.name: testClearRecommendedDownPayment
test-method.description: TC_CC_N01 – Clear Recommended Down Payment and save; expect validation error

exception.message: TC_CC_N01 FAIL – Validation error should appear when Recommended Down Payment is cleared. expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: TC_CC_N01 FAIL – Validation error should appear when Recommended Down Payment is cleared. expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(NativeMethodAccessorImpl.java:77) at test-method.name: testLettersInDownPayment
test-method.description: TC_CC_N07 – Replace Recommended Down Payment with letters; expect validation error

test-method.name: testNegativeInterestRate
test-method.description: TC_CC_N08 – Replace Interest Percentage with a negative value; expect validation error
